hero.description: I live at the intersection of **frontend** and **backend** with TypeScript. I build clean, scalable __React__ interfaces and reliable __Node.js__ APIs that ship to production.

fileBanner: // Fullstack Developer | Problem Solver | Coffee & Code Enthusiast
professionalSummary: I'm a **fullstack developer** with **3+ years** of experience building high-performance web applications. My expertise spans from crafting seamless user interfaces to architecting scalable backend systems.

Specializing in **Next.js**, **React**, and **PostgreSQL**, I focus on technical SEO optimization and delivering products that prioritize user experience. I believe great software solves real problems elegantly.
milestones: Developed **Ling's Home** - A comprehensive digital service management platform that streamlined operations for 100+ businesses
Mastered **technical SEO** and **performance optimization**, improving page load times by 60% on average
Built **AI-powered features** and **ML integrations** as part of EdTech solutions
Contributed to **10+ production projects** across e-commerce, SaaS, and education sectors

about.philosophy: Great software is built on three pillars: **clean code**, **user empathy**, and **continuous learning**. I strive to create products that are not just functional, but truly delightful to use.

experiences.title: Junior Software Developer
experiences.description: Building intelligent backend systems and AI integrations for an EdTech platform. ML-powered personalization, RAG pipelines, and scalable APIs serving thousands of learners daily.

experiences.title: User Experience Designer

experiences.description: Managed and maintained backend systems and databases to support enterprise-level web applications. Ensured uptime, performance, and data integrity across production systems.
